items.name: Blade of the Drow Lord
items.notes: Dain's new primary weapon — upgrades from +1 Longsword to +2

items.name: Venom Fang
items.notes: Ala's backup melee/thrown weapon — devastating poison on hit

items.name: Shadowscale Leathers

mechanics.resistance: choose one: fire, cold, or poison (attuned at wearing)

items.notes: Ala's armor upgrade — +2 AC and one damage resistance

items.name: Cloak of the Arcane Sentinel

aura.secondary_effect: allies gain advantage on death saves

items.notes: Sweeney's support item — boosts party AC and saves, especially valuable in group combat

items.name: Wand of the Burning Phoenix

mechanics.special_effect: hit terrain ignites, becomes difficult terrain (fire)

items.notes: Raistlin's offensive tool — 7 casts of enhanced fireball, terrain control bonus

items.name: Tome of the Drow Archlich

mechanics.copy_mechanics: Can be copied into Raistlin's spellbook via Forge of Spells at cost

items.notes: Legendary source material — includes Counterspell and Feeblemind, crucial support spells

items.name: Elixir of Greater Vitality
items.notes: Party healing reserves — 4 potions available for emergencies

items.name: Scroll of Planar Convergence

mechanics.effect: open a portal to any known plane or location within 500 miles
mechanics.distance: up to 50 miles or between planes
mechanics.reusability: uses both charges, then scroll crumbles to ash

items.notes: LEGENDARY emergency escape tool — 2 uses for planar/long-distance teleportation

items.name: Forge of Spells

mechanics.attunement_bonus: all enchantment costs and time requirements are HALVED
capabilities: Enchant mundane weapons into +1, +2, +3 magical weapons
Enchant mundane armor into +1, +2, +3 magical armor
Create spell scrolls from known spells (1st-6th level)
Inscribe runes and imbue magical essence
mechanics.materials_needed: rare gems, magical dust, spell components (varies by item)
mechanics.location: wave-echo-cave (portable via strong magic or cart)

items.notes: PRIMARY TREASURE — enables unlimited magical item creation for the party. Raistlin's perfect attunement (nat 20) cuts all costs in half.

total_loot_value: approximately 25000+ gp (including Forge and Scroll of Planar Convergence)
summary: Blade of the Drow Lord (Dain's new weapon)
Cloak of the Arcane Sentinel (Sweeney's party support item)
Wand of the Burning Phoenix (Raistlin's fireball wand)
Tome of the Drow Archlich (Raistlin's spellbook source)
Elixir of Greater Vitality x4 (party healing)
Scroll of Planar Convergence (LEGENDARY emergency escape)
Forge of Spells (LEGENDARY artifact — enchantment engine)
next_steps: Go through each character's Level 4 breakdown with items
Plan Forge usage for party upgrades
Decide which spells to copy from Drow Archlich into Raistlin's spellbook
